stories.title: Takeaways from Spurs-Timberwolves Game 3
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next -- for the 76ers-Knicks, Cavs-Pistons, Wolves-Spurs and Lakers-Thunder series.

stories.title: Spurs take 2-1 series lead behind Wemby's gem
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 39 points, 15 rebounds and more game-wrecking defense for the Spurs, who took a 2-1 series lead with a 115-108 victory over the Timberwolves on Friday night.

stories.title: Finch calls out Brothers' 'unprofessional behavior...
stories.summary: Timberwolves coach Chris Finch called it "completely unprofessional behavior" for official Tony Brothers to confront him on two separate occasions during a fourth-quarter stoppage Friday night in Game 3.

stories.title: Brunson shuts door on 76ers as Knicks go up 3-0
stories.summary: Behind 33 points from Jalen Brunson, including big buckets late, the Knicks held off the 76ers to take a 3-0 lead in the semifinal series.

stories.title: Historic heat: Misiorowski tops 103 mph 10 times
stories.summary: Milwaukee Brewers right-hander Jacob Misiorowski threw 10 pitches of at least 103 mph Friday and produced the highest velocity any starter has reached since Statcast tracking began in 2008.
